question:
Vumpuses are sour. Each vumpus is a zumpus. Every zumpus is angry. Each zumpus is a tumpus. Tumpuses are not small. Every tumpus is a yumpus. Each yumpus is not blue. Yumpuses are rompuses. Each rompus is not fruity. Wumpuses are fruity. Every rompus is a numpus. Numpuses are hot. Each numpus is an impus. Every impus is transparent. Every impus is a dumpus. Dumpuses are wooden. Every dumpus is a jompus. Sam is a vumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Sam is not fruity.
